languages.text: "Это древняя и огромная тварь. Еще мой прадед ее в корнях видал. Настолько близко она к нам впервые вылезла, но знакомы мы с ней давненько".
"That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."
languages.original_text: "Это древняя и огромная тварь. Еще мой прадед ее в корнях видал. Настолько близко она к нам впервые вылезла, но знакомы мы с ней давненько".

traits.locale_text: "That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known of it for ages, but it's the first time it got this close."
"That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."
"It's a creature, in a word. Ancient and huge. But drawing so near to us? That's a first. It practically has us under siege."
"That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known of it for ages, but it's the first time it got this close."
"That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."
"That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."

languages.text: 「要するに、生物だ。太古の巨大な存在だ。だが、ここまで接近してきたのは初めてだ。こちらはほとんど包囲下にあるも同然だ」
languages.original_text: "It's a creature, in a word. Ancient and huge. But drawing so near to us? That's a first. It practically has us under siege."

traits.locale_text: 要するに、生物だ。太古の巨大な存在だ。だが、ここまで接近してきたのは初めてだ。こちらはほとんど包囲下にあるも同然だ。

languages.text: « Cette chose est aussi ancienne que colossale. Mon arrière-grand-père l'avait déjà aperçue dans les racines en son temps. Nous savons qu'elle existe depuis des siècles, mais c'est la première fois qu'elle s'approche de si près. »
languages.original_text: "That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."

traits.locale_text: « Cette chose est aussi ancienne que colossale. Mon arrière-grand-père l'avait déjà aperçue dans les racines en son temps. Nous savons qu'elle existe depuis des siècles, mais c'est la première fois qu'elle s'approche de si près. »

languages.text: "O şey kadim ve devasa. Büyük atam çok eskiden onu köklerin arasında görmüş. Yüzyıllardır varlığından haberdardık ama ilk kez bu kadar yakınımıza geldi."
languages.original_text: "That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."

traits.locale_text: "O şey kadim ve devasa. Büyük atam çok eskiden onu köklerin arasında görmüş. Yüzyıllardır varlığından haberdardık ama ilk kez bu kadar yakınımıza geldi."

languages.text: «Esa cosa es enorme y muy antigua. Mi bisabuelo la vio en las raíces. Sabemos de su existencia desde hace mucho, pero nunca se había acercado tanto».
languages.original_text: "That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."

traits.locale_text: «Esa cosa es enorme y muy antigua. Mi bisabuelo la vio en las raíces. Sabemos de su existencia desde hace mucho, pero nunca se había acercado tanto».

languages.text: “那东西古老而巨大。我曾祖父很久以前就在根系里见过它。我们早就知道它的存在，但这是它第一次离我们这么近。”
languages.original_text: "That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."

traits.locale_text: “那东西古老而巨大。我曾祖父很久以前就在根系里见过它。我们早就知道它的存在，但这是它第一次离我们这么近。”

languages.text: "Dieses Ding ist uralt und riesig. Mein Urgroßvater hat es seinerzeit in den Wurzeln gesehen. Wir kennen es seit Jahrhunderten, aber so nahe kam es uns noch nie."
languages.original_text: "That thing is ancient and huge. My great-grandfather saw it in the roots way back. We've known about it for ages, but this is the first time it got this close."

traits.locale_text: "Dieses Ding ist uralt und riesig. Mein Urgroßvater hat es seinerzeit in den Wurzeln gesehen. Wir kennen es seit Jahrhunderten, aber so nahe kam es uns noch nie."
